title: Belgium Expresses Shock After FIFA Lifts U.S. Player’s Suspension
summary_full: The American striker Folarin Balogun is eligible to play in a World Cup match against Belgium on Monday night after soccer officials reversed his one-game ban.
summary_public: The American striker Folarin Balogun is eligible to play in a World Cup match against Belgium on Monday night after soccer officials reversed his one-game ban.
